title: Run Configuration and Lifecycle

use_cases.name: Configure Run Parameters
use_cases.description: Developer creates a RunConfig dataclass to control global run behavior before invoking Runner
key_params: model: str | Model | None — override model for entire run
model_settings: ModelSettings | None — global temperature/top_p overrides
max_turns: int — default DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS=10, passed at call site not in RunConfig
tracing: TracingConfig | None — per-run trace export settings
workflow_name: str — logical trace label, default 'Agent workflow'
trace_id: str | None — custom trace ID
group_id: str | None — link traces across conversation turns
trace_metadata: dict | None — additional trace metadata
nest_handoff_history: bool — opt-in beta, collapse transcript on handoff
call_model_input_filter: CallModelInputFilter | None — edit model input pre-call

use_cases.name: Start Synchronous Run
use_cases.description: Call Runner.run_sync(agent, input, max_turns, hooks, run_config, ...) — wraps async run() in a new event loop
use_cases.signature: Runner.run_sync(starting_agent, input, *, context, max_turns=10, hooks, run_config, error_handlers, previous_response_id, auto_previous_response_id, conversation_id, session) -> RunResult

use_cases.name: Start Async Run
use_cases.description: Call await Runner.run(agent, input, ...) — async entry point returning RunResult when complete
use_cases.signature: Runner.run(starting_agent, input, *, context, max_turns=10, hooks, run_config, error_handlers, previous_response_id, auto_previous_response_id, conversation_id, session) -> RunResult

use_cases.name: Start Streaming Run
use_cases.description: Call Runner.run_streamed(agent, input, ...) — returns RunResultStreaming immediately; developer iterates .stream_events()
use_cases.signature: Runner.run_streamed(starting_agent, input, context, max_turns=10, hooks, run_config, ...) -> RunResultStreaming

use_cases.name: Set Max Turns Limit
use_cases.description: Pass max_turns=N to any Runner entry point. Runner raises MaxTurnsExceeded if limit is exceeded. DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS=10.
exceptions: MaxTurnsExceeded — raised when turns exceed max_turns

use_cases.name: Handle Max Turns via Error Handler
use_cases.description: Pass error_handlers={'max_turns': fn} to intercept MaxTurnsExceeded and return a controlled RunResult instead of raising

use_cases.name: Attach Lifecycle Hooks
use_cases.description: Pass hooks: RunHooks instance to any Runner.run* method to observe run events
use_cases.note: RunHooks = RunHooksBase[TContext, Agent]; hooks parameter accepted at call site (not in RunConfig)

use_cases.name: Observe LLM Start/End
use_cases.description: RunHooksBase.on_llm_start(context, agent, system_prompt, input_items) and on_llm_end(context, agent, response) called around each LLM invocation

use_cases.name: Observe Agent Start/End
use_cases.description: on_agent_start(context, agent) called when active agent changes; on_agent_end(context, agent, output) when final output produced

use_cases.name: Observe Tool Start/End
use_cases.description: on_tool_start(context, agent, tool) and on_tool_end(context, agent, tool, result) called around local tool execution

use_cases.name: Observe Handoff
use_cases.description: on_handoff(context, from_agent, to_agent) called when a handoff occurs between agents

use_cases.name: Configure Tracing
use_cases.description: Set tracing_disabled=True to disable all tracing; or provide TracingConfig to override export settings. trace_include_sensitive_data defaults from env var OPENAI_AGENTS_TRACE_INCLUDE_SENSITIVE_DATA

use_cases.name: Resume Interrupted Run
use_cases.description: Pass a RunState object as input to any Runner.run* method to resume a paused/interrupted run. SDK preserves conversation_id/previous_response_id across resume.

use_cases.name: Manage Conversation State
use_cases.description: Choose one of: result.to_input_list() (manual), session=Session (auto client-side), conversation_id (server-side OpenAI), previous_response_id / auto_previous_response_id (lightweight chaining)

use_cases.name: Filter Model Input Pre-Call
use_cases.description: Provide RunConfig.call_model_input_filter: Callable[[CallModelData], ModelInputData] to trim/inject/reorder input items immediately before each LLM call

key_classes: RunConfig — @dataclass, all global run settings (no max_turns; that lives at call site)
RunOptions — TypedDict with context, max_turns, hooks, run_config, previous_response_id, auto_previous_response_id, conversation_id, session, error_handlers
Runner — static class with classmethods: run(), run_sync(), run_streamed()
AgentRunner — experimental instance-based runner with same three methods via RunOptions **kwargs
RunHooksBase[TContext, TAgent] — abstract base; override on_llm_start/end, on_agent_start/end, on_handoff, on_tool_start/end
RunHooks = RunHooksBase[TContext, Agent] — public alias for standard Agent hooks
AgentHooksBase[TContext, TAgent] — per-agent hooks on agent.hooks; mirrors RunHooksBase with on_start/on_end instead of on_agent_start/end
RunResult — returned by run() and run_sync()
RunState[TContext] — serializable interrupted run state; used for resume
RunErrorHandlers[TContext] — dict keyed by error kind ('max_turns')
SandboxRunConfig — grouped sandbox runtime config (client, session, manifest, snapshot, concurrency_limits)
CallModelData[TContext] — passed to call_model_input_filter with model_data, agent, context
ModelInputData — input: list[TResponseInputItem], instructions: str | None
ToolErrorFormatterArgs[TContext] — kind, tool_type, tool_name, call_id, default_message, run_context
key_relationships: Runner uses RunConfig for global settings
Runner accepts RunHooks at call site (not via RunConfig)
RunHooksBase triggers on_llm_start/end, on_agent_start/end, on_tool_start/end, on_handoff
AgentHooksBase mirrors RunHooksBase but is scoped to a single agent (agent.hooks)
RunConfig.call_model_input_filter intercepts CallModelData → returns ModelInputData before each LLM call
RunConfig.tool_error_formatter receives ToolErrorFormatterArgs → returns str | None
RunErrorHandlers['max_turns'] receives RunErrorHandlerInput → returns RunErrorHandlerResult instead of raising MaxTurnsExceeded
business_rules: DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS = 10; developer overrides per call via max_turns parameter
Model override in RunConfig takes precedence over per-Agent model
tracing_disabled=True suppresses all spans; trace_include_sensitive_data=False keeps spans but strips payload data
nest_handoff_history is opt-in beta (default False); collapses prior transcript into single assistant message on handoff
session cannot be combined with conversation_id / previous_response_id / auto_previous_response_id
reasoning_item_id_policy='omit' strips reasoning item IDs to avoid Responses API 400 errors
call_model_input_filter runs after session history merge; returning wrong type raises UserError
AgentRunner is experimental/internal — not part of public API
